title: PVP Vitals
description: A modpack with all mods and resource packs for PVP
body:
# PVP Vitals
## Currently in alpha
## A minimalistic PVP Modpack containing everything for new players!
### Tested with ATLauncher, Modrinth Launcher, Prism Launcher and GDLauncher
### Tested on Windows and Linux with NVIDIA drivers
Supported versions: 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.5, 1.21.7, 1.21.8
## 1.21.8 news!
  1.21.8 has been released with some caveats. There are a few mods that haven't been added due to this being a smaller update for the game, but if they do drop I will do my best to add them. Also some mods were replaced such as Freelook with Camera Tweaks.
## IMPORTANT
  Currently on some setups 1.21.1 and 1.21.8 might not work and I'm trying to fix that, disable some mods and troubleshoot yourself until I fix it! Send me a DM on discord if having issues!


Mods and Texture packs:
- 3D skin layers
- Appleskin
- Concurrent chunk management Engine
- Dynamic FPS
- BactroMod
- Effect Timer Plus
- Freelook
- Marlow's crystal optimizer
- ImmediatelyFast
- Lithium
- Sodium
- Low on fire
- Low Shield
- Model gap fix
- Mod menu
- Packet fixer
- Sodium extra
- Reese's Sodium options
- Resourcify
- Shulker Box Tooltips
- uku's Armor HUD
- Zoomify
- Very many players

Using Resourcify you can browse texture packs.

FOV: Recommended 80-110, 
Recommended to change keybinds!
For Crystal PVP Players, turn off Explosions in the video settings!

If you want to support me:
[https://ko-fi.com/luxymillian](https://ko-fi.com/luxymillian)

If you need help in any way with the modpack or want to send feedback send me a dm on discord - luxymillian.

Added info about the modpack

This modpack doesnt't have all the solutions for mainstream pvp. The user has the opportunity to add any mods necessary. This modpack is meant for people who like to play regular Minecraft and don't want a bunch of fixes. If you play "chill" PVP, maybe with some friends and not really into PVP this is the modpack for you. (or if you preffer simplicity) If that's not the case I recommend either adding extra mods and resource packs or using a different PVP modpack or custom client.

I, Luxymillian am not responsible for any issues you encounter playing on servers with this modpack. My advice is to double check the mods and see if they give an unfair advantage on servers you play.

Images of Resource packs, Armor HUD & Appleskin.
